prose.en: Ensure network infrastructure is kept up-to-date. Example implementations include running the latest stable release of software and/or using currently supported network as a service (Naas) offerings. Review software versions monthly, or more frequently, to verify software support.
Network infrastructure is kept up to date.
Software versions are reviewed monthly, or more frequently, to verify software support.

example.en: Example implementations include running the latest stable release of software and/or using currently supported network as a service (NaaS) offerings.
